untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-leg arbitrage logic involving (1) basket correlation analysis to index, (2) relative valuation of index futures/options vs. spot, and (3) simultaneous long-short execution across multiple instruments. The backtest engine indicators do not include correlation metrics, implied vs. realized volatility spreads, or index-relative pricing models needed to detect 'overpriced futures/options' or confirm 'basket performance geared to index'. Entry and exit conditions require fundamental asset selection and relative value assessment beyond technical indicators.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_237 is a statistical arbitrage / pairs trading strategy that cannot be meaningfully reduced to single-instrument price-action rules. It requires portfolio-level correlation analysis and derivatives pricing models outside the scope of this indicator set.
